turns.content:
<objective>
Update existing gap closure plans (04-07) for Phase 24.3.1-governance-session-prototype with a PROJECT-WIDE session naming system. The existing plans are too tool-specific — they need to be expanded to cover ALL session creation paths across the framework.

## The Real Scope: Project-Wide Session Naming Standard

The session naming system must apply to EVERY session created through OpenCode SDK — not just the governance tool. There are 3 creation points:

1. `src/coordination/delegation/sdk-child-session-starter.ts:26` — title: `Delegation: ${agent}` (delegate-task pipeline)
2. `src/coordination/spawner/session-creator.ts:21` — title: `args.request.title` (spawner/PTY pipeline)
3. `src/features/governance-engine/create-governance-session.ts:110` — title: `hm-governance:{agent}-{title}` (governance tool)

And 3 integration points for title persistence:
A. `src/features/session-tracker/types.ts:51-70` — SessionRecord missing title field
B. `src/features/session-tracker/persistence/session-writer.ts:87-97` — initializeSessionFile doesn't write title
C. `src/hooks/lifecycle/session-hooks.ts:302` — kernel packet hardcodes `title: "unknown"`

## Naming Convention (approved)

Format: `{framework}/{workflow}/{classification}/{agent}/{purpose}@{depth}`

Examples:
- `hm/governance/root/gsd-auditor/audit-phase23-notifications@0`
- `hm/delegate/child/gsd-researcher/research-mcp-patterns@1`
- `hm/planning/root/gsd-planner/plan-gap-closure@0`
- `hm/delegate/grandchild/gsd-executor/implement-fix@2`

Machine-parsable fields:
```
framework = parts[0]        # hm | gsd
workflow = parts[1]         # governance | delegate | planning | execute
classification = parts[2]   # root | child | grandchild | fork
agent = parts[3]            # gsd-auditor | gsd-planner
purpose_depth = parts[4].split('@')
purpose = purpose_depth[0]  # audit-phase23-notifications
depth = purpose_depth[1]    # 0 | 1 | 2
```

## Architecture: Session Naming Service

Create `src/shared/session-naming.ts` — a SINGLE source of truth for generating session titles:

```typescript
interface NamingInput {
  framework: "hm" | "gsd" | string
  workflow: string       // governance | delegate | planning | execute | spawn
  classification: "root" | "child" | "grandchild" | "fork"
  agent: string          // gsd-auditor | gsd-researcher | etc
  purpose: string        // short description
  depth: number          // 0 = root, 1 = child, 2 = grandchild, etc
}

function generateSessionTitle(input: NamingInput): string
function parseSessionTitle(title: string): NamingInput | null  // reverse parsing for machine use
```

## What Each Updated Plan Should Cover

### Plan 04 (GAP-C → expanded): Session Naming Service + Tracker Integration
- Create `src/shared/session-naming.ts` with generateSessionTitle() and parseSessionTitle()
- Add `title` field to `SessionRecord` interface
- Fix `initializeSessionFile` to write title into frontmatter
- Fix `session-hooks.ts:302` — use real title from continuity/session metadata
- Unit tests for naming service (generate + parse)
- Unit tests for frontmatter title capture

### Plan 05 (GAP-A → expanded): Governance Config + Naming Standards
- Create `.hivemind/governance/config.json` with agent/command/template mappings
- Include `naming_standards` section in config (framework, workflow prefixes)
- Add `config-reader.ts` that provides config to all consumers

### Plan 06 (GAP-B → expanded): All Creation Points Use Naming Service
- Update `sdk-child-session-starter.ts:26` — replace `Delegation: ${agent}` with `generateSessionTitle({workflow:"delegate", ...})`
- Update `session-creator.ts:21` — use naming service via spawn request
- Update `create-governance-session.ts:110` — use naming service
- Create ROOT session (no parentID) for governance sessions
- Replace raw `sendPrompt()` with `coordinator.dispatch()` for governance tool
- Unit tests for all creation points

### Plan 07 (GAP-D → expanded): Delegation Metadata Propagation
- Pass agent name, workflow, depth through to delegation tracking
- Fix `delegatedBy.agentName`, `mainAgent.name`, `subagentType` from "unknown"
- Update hierarchy manifest with correct metadata
- All via the naming service's standardized fields

## Files to Read

Read ALL these files before planning:

1. `src/coordination/delegation/sdk-child-session-starter.ts` — current title pattern
2. `src/coordination/spawner/session-creator.ts` — current title pattern  
3. `src/coordination/spawner/spawner-types.ts` — DelegationSpawnRequest with title field
4. `src/coordination/spawner/spawn-request-builder.ts:43` — default title generation
5. `src/features/governance-engine/create-governance-session.ts` — current tool
6. `src/features/session-tracker/types.ts` — SessionRecord interface
7. `src/features/session-tracker/persistence/session-writer.ts` — initializeSessionFile
8. `src/hooks/lifecycle/session-hooks.ts:302` — kernel packet hardcode
9. `src/tools/delegation/delegate-task.ts` — coordinator dispatch pattern
10. `.planning/phases/24.3.1-governance-session-prototype/24.3.1-04-PLAN.md` — existing gap plan
11. `.planning/phases/24.3.1-governance-session-prototype/24.3.1-05-PLAN.md` — existing gap plan
12. `.planning/phases/24.3.1-governance-session-prototype/24.3.1-06-PLAN.md` — existing gap plan
13. `.planning/phases/24.3.1-governance-session-prototype/24.3.1-07-PLAN.md` — existing gap plan

## Output

UPDATE the existing PLAN.md files (04-07) with the expanded scope. Each plan MUST include:
- Frontmatter (wave, depends_on, files_modified, autonomous)
- Tasks with `<read_first>`, `<acceptance_criteria>`, `<action>` 
- Verification criteria
- must_haves for goal-backward verification

Write to: `.planning/phases/24.3.1-governance-session-prototype/24.3.1-{04|05|06|07}-PLAN.md`

Also create a new Plan 00 (plan 00) for the Session Naming Service itself if it makes sense as a prerequisite.

Wave order:
- Wave 0 (NEW): Plan 00 — Session Naming Service (prerequisite, created before all others)
- Wave 1: Plan 04 (Session Tracker Title) + Plan 05 (Governance Config)
- Wave 2: Plan 06 (Creation Points + Root Session + Agent Dispatch)
- Wave 3: Plan 07 (Delegation Metadata)
Now let me read all the referenced source files and existing plans to understand the current state.
Now let me read the existing PLAN.md files (04-07) and the coordinator.ts file:
Let me read the SPEC.md and ROADMAP.md for the phase definition:
Let me read the ROADMAP phase definition and some additional files:
Now let me write all 5 plan files. Starting with Plan 00 (NEW — Session Naming Service):
Now write the updated Plan 04 — Session Tracker Title Integration with expanded scope:
Now write the updated Plan 05 — Governance Config + Naming Standards:
Now write the expanded Plan 06 — All Creation Points Use Naming Service + Root Session + Agent Dispatch:
Now write the expanded Plan 07 — Delegation Metadata Propagation:
Let me verify the files and fix any issues:

All 5 plan files are written and verified. Here's the complete summary:

---

## PLANNING COMPLETE

**Phase:** 24.3.1-governance-session-prototype
**Plans:** 5 plan(s) + 3 existing completed = 8 total in 5 waves
**Gap closure:** Plans 04-07 (expanded) + new Plan 00 (Session Naming Service)

### Wave Structure

| Wave | Plans | Autonomous | What |
|------|-------|------------|------|
| **0** (NEW) | **00** — Session Naming Service | yes | `src/shared/session-naming.ts` — single source of truth for ALL title generation/parsing |
| 1 | **04** — Session Tracker Title + **05** — Governance Config + Naming Standards | yes, yes | SessionRecord title field, frontmatter, kernel packet fix + config with naming_standards |
| 2 | **06** — All Creation Points Use Naming Service | yes | ALL 3 creation points updated + root session + coordinator dispatch + config reader integration |
| 3 | **07** — Delegation Metadata Propagation | yes | `parseSessionTitle()` as primary source across all 5 metadata propagation points |

### Plans Created/Updated

| Plan | Objective | Tasks | Status |
|------|-----------|-------|--------|
| **00** (NEW) | Session naming service: `generateSessionTitle()` + `parseSessionTitle()` | 2 | ⬛ Not started |
| **04** (UPDATED) | SessionRecord title + frontmatter + kernel packet fix + naming service tests | 4 | ⬛ Not started |
| **05** (UPDATED) | Governance config with `naming_standards` section + `validateNamingTitle()` | 3 | ⬛ Not started |
| **06** (UPDATED) | All 3 creation points use naming service + root session + coordinator dispatch + config reader | 6 | ⬛ Not started |
| **07** (UPDATED) | Delegation metadata via `parseSessionTitle()` across 5 metadata points | 6 | ⬛ Not started |

### Key Architecture Changes

**New module:** `src/shared/session-naming.ts` — zero-dependency pure logic with:
- `generateSessionTitle(input: NamingInput)` → `"hm/governance/root/gsd-auditor/audit@0"`
- `parseSessionTitle(title)` → `{framework, workflow, classification, agent, purpose, depth}`

**After all plans, session titles will be:**
- Delegation child: `"hm/delegate/child/gsd-researcher/research-mcp-patterns@1"`
- Governance root: `"hm/governance/root/gsd-auditor/audit-phase23@0"`
- PTY spawn child: `"hm/spawn/child/gsd-executor/implement-fix@1"`

**Metadata propagation uses `parseSessionTitle()`** instead of fallback chains — since every session now has a naming-service-formatted title, the agent name, workflow, and depth are extracted from the title itself rather than relying on separate metadata fields.

### Execution Order

```
Wave 0: Plan 00 (pure utility — no deps)
  └─ Wave 1: Plan 04 (depends on 00) + Plan 05 (no deps)
      └─ Wave 2: Plan 06 (depends on 00, 05)
          └─ Wave 3: Plan 07 (depends on 06)
```

### Next Steps

Execute: `/gsd-execute-phase 24.3.1-governance-session-prototype`

<sub>`/clear` first — fresh context window</sub>
